markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on strategy to accelerate lead generation and improve AI visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/5chbEvYzwmg7EmTtAigutYuK9bbXxwi2?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New Goal:** 5x monthly leads (from \~10 to 50) by tracking `Book a Demo`, `Free Pro`, and `Free Trial` completions.](https://fathom.video/share/5chbEvYzwmg7EmTtAigutYuK9bbXxwi2?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
  - [**Content Strategy Shift:** Focus on specific use cases (e.g., "call-off reports") instead of broad terms ("frontline intelligence") to match user search intent and drive LLM visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/5chbEvYzwmg7EmTtAigutYuK9bbXxwi2?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [**Content Volume Increase:** Raise weekly refreshes from 2 to 4 to accelerate momentum and address LLM visibility gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/5chbEvYzwmg7EmTtAigutYuK9bbXxwi2?tab=summary&timestamp=2025.0)
  - [**Technical Fixes:** Resolve non-indexing content by refreshing one article and changing the URL of another. Manually fix 83 broken internal links.](https://fathom.video/share/5chbEvYzwmg7EmTtAigutYuK9bbXxwi2?tab=summary&timestamp=1051.0)

## Topics

### Performance & Lead Generation

  - [**Performance Gap:** Current support is insufficient for aggressive lead generation targets.](https://fathom.video/share/5chbEvYzwmg7EmTtAigutYuK9bbXxwi2?tab=summary&timestamp=105.0)
  - [**Lead Goal:** 5x monthly leads.](https://fathom.video/share/5chbEvYzwmg7EmTtAigutYuK9bbXxwi2?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
      - [**Baseline:** \~10 leads in January.](https://fathom.video/share/5chbEvYzwmg7EmTtAigutYuK9bbXxwi2?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
      - [**Target:** 25 leads by month-end.](https://fathom.video/share/5chbEvYzwmg7EmTtAigutYuK9bbXxwi2?tab=summary&timestamp=2177.0)
  - [**Tracking:** Focus on `Book a Demo`, `Free Pro`, and `Free Trial` completions.](https://fathom.video/share/5chbEvYzwmg7EmTtAigutYuK9bbXxwi2?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
      - [**Rationale:** These events are the most accurate lead indicators.](https://fathom.video/share/5chbEvYzwmg7EmTtAigutYuK9bbXxwi2?tab=summary&timestamp=1404.0)
      - [**Note:** A \~20% discount is applied to account for spam.](https://fathom.video/share/5chbEvYzwmg7EmTtAigutYuK9bbXxwi2?tab=summary&timestamp=1503.0)

### AI Visibility & Content Strategy

  - [**Tool Transition:** Moving from Scrunch to an internal AI visibility tool.](https://fathom.video/share/5chbEvYzwmg7EmTtAigutYuK9bbXxwi2?tab=summary&timestamp=410.0)
      - [**Benefit:** Provides granular data, including exact citation URLs and co-mentioned brands.](https://fathom.video/share/5chbEvYzwmg7EmTtAigutYuK9bbXxwi2?tab=summary&timestamp=486.0)
  - [**Visibility Gap:** Yourco is cited in Google AI Overviews and Perplexity but is completely absent from ChatGPT results.](https://fathom.video/share/5chbEvYzwmg7EmTtAigutYuK9bbXxwi2?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
      - [**Action:** Investigate the cause of the ChatGPT gap.](https://fathom.video/share/5chbEvYzwmg7EmTtAigutYuK9bbXxwi2?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
  - [**Content Strategy Shift:**](https://fathom.video/share/5chbEvYzwmg7EmTtAigutYuK9bbXxwi2?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
      - [**Problem:** The "frontline intelligence" subcluster is underperforming because it doesn't match user search intent.](https://fathom.video/share/5chbEvYzwmg7EmTtAigutYuK9bbXxwi2?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
      - [**Solution:** Pivot to use-case-specific content framed as "reporting" (e.g., "call-off reports," "safety concern reports").](https://fathom.video/share/5chbEvYzwmg7EmTtAigutYuK9bbXxwi2?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [**Digital PR Tracking:** The new tool will track impact from upcoming PR (e.g., Forbes feature).](https://fathom.video/share/5chbEvYzwmg7EmTtAigutYuK9bbXxwi2?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)

### Content Production & Technical SEO

  - [**Content Volume Increase:**](https://fathom.video/share/5chbEvYzwmg7EmTtAigutYuK9bbXxwi2?tab=summary&timestamp=2025.0)
      - [**Action:** Increase weekly refreshes from 2 to 4 for the next two weeks to accelerate momentum.](https://fathom.video/share/5chbEvYzwmg7EmTtAigutYuK9bbXxwi2?tab=summary&timestamp=2025.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Refreshes are low-cost and effective for improving LLM visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/5chbEvYzwmg7EmTtAigutYuK9bbXxwi2?tab=summary&timestamp=2025.0)
  - [**Refresh Strategy:**](https://fathom.video/share/5chbEvYzwmg7EmTtAigutYuK9bbXxwi2?tab=summary&timestamp=1606.0)
      - [**Prioritization:** Target articles that have lost keyword position, especially to competitors like Staffbase.](https://fathom.video/share/5chbEvYzwmg7EmTtAigutYuK9bbXxwi2?tab=summary&timestamp=1631.0)
      - [**Optimization:**](https://fathom.video/share/5chbEvYzwmg7EmTtAigutYuK9bbXxwi2?tab=summary&timestamp=1834.0)
          - [Integrate the "frontline intelligence" narrative.](https://fathom.video/share/5chbEvYzwmg7EmTtAigutYuK9bbXxwi2?tab=summary&timestamp=1834.0)
          - [Use tables and bullet points to create structured data that LLMs can easily parse.](https://fathom.video/share/5chbEvYzwmg7EmTtAigutYuK9bbXxwi2?tab=summary&timestamp=1834.0)
  - [**Non-Indexing Content Fixes:**](https://fathom.video/share/5chbEvYzwmg7EmTtAigutYuK9bbXxwi2?tab=summary&timestamp=1051.0)
      - [**"ROI of streamlined call-off communication":** Refresh to clarify the "ROI" angle (monetary vs. benefits) and align with LLM queries.](https://fathom.video/share/5chbEvYzwmg7EmTtAigutYuK9bbXxwi2?tab=summary&timestamp=1271.0)
      - [**"How can I manage my workforce to most employees on smartphones?":** Change the URL to a shorter, more relevant slug (e.g., `/employees-without-smartphones/`).](https://fathom.video/share/5chbEvYzwmg7EmTtAigutYuK9bbXxwi2?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)
  - [**URL Best Practice:** Keep all new URLs under 60 characters.](https://fathom.video/share/5chbEvYzwmg7EmTtAigutYuK9bbXxwi2?tab=summary&timestamp=1141.0)
  - [**Broken Link Fix:** Manually fix 83 broken internal links on Prismic.](https://fathom.video/share/5chbEvYzwmg7EmTtAigutYuK9bbXxwi2?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Carrie:**](https://fathom.video/share/5chbEvYzwmg7EmTtAigutYuK9bbXxwi2?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)
      - [Schedule a CRO meeting with Kyle and Jason.](https://fathom.video/share/5chbEvYzwmg7EmTtAigutYuK9bbXxwi2?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)
      - [Investigate the ChatGPT visibility gap.](https://fathom.video/share/5chbEvYzwmg7EmTtAigutYuK9bbXxwi2?tab=summary&timestamp=663.0)
      - [Create a new competitor category in the AI tool for "employee communication."](https://fathom.video/share/5chbEvYzwmg7EmTtAigutYuK9bbXxwi2?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)
      - [Confirm the 83 broken link fix is completed this week.](https://fathom.video/share/5chbEvYzwmg7EmTtAigutYuK9bbXxwi2?tab=summary&timestamp=936.0)
      - [Implement the 4 new / 4 refresh weekly content plan.](https://fathom.video/share/5chbEvYzwmg7EmTtAigutYuK9bbXxwi2?tab=summary&timestamp=2065.0)
      - [Direct the content team to use tables/bullets and the "frontline intelligence" narrative in refreshes.](https://fathom.video/share/5chbEvYzwmg7EmTtAigutYuK9bbXxwi2?tab=summary&timestamp=1834.0)
      - [Refresh the "ROI" article and change the URL for the "employees on smartphones" article.](https://fathom.video/share/5chbEvYzwmg7EmTtAigutYuK9bbXxwi2?tab=summary&timestamp=1271.0)
  - [**Jessica:**](https://fathom.video/share/5chbEvYzwmg7EmTtAigutYuK9bbXxwi2?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
      - [Provide actual monthly lead numbers for tracking.](https://fathom.video/share/5chbEvYzwmg7EmTtAigutYuK9bbXxwi2?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)
